response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of a talking portion followed by the performance of the song 'CHRONIC'. The talking part is multilingual, featuring English, Indonesian, and Japanese. The song 'CHRONIC' is performed in English. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio. On-screen burnt-in lyrics were used to verify the song's transcription. The Reference JSON provided the lyrics for 'CHRONIC', which match the audio phonetically and structurally.

subtitles.original: ...of your fave.
subtitles.english: ...of your fave.

subtitles.original: Kartu ini itu oshi holo mem card gitu guys.
subtitles.english: This card is like an oshi Holomem card, guys.

subtitles.original: For details about the card and how to play, please check the website!
subtitles.english: For details about the card and how to play, please check the website!

subtitles.original: ね、カードの詳細や遊び方についてはね、
subtitles.english: So, regarding the details and how to play the card,

subtitles.original: ホームページで確認してくださいね。
subtitles.english: please check the homepage!

subtitles.original: Also the card will be available in Japanese only by the way.
subtitles.english: Also the card will be available in Japanese only by the way.

subtitles.original: 日本語、日本語のみですね、カードの方は。
subtitles.english: As for the card, it will only be in Japanese.

subtitles.original: This bonus by the way is only valid for purchases made at hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP.
subtitles.english: This bonus by the way is only valid for purchases made at hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP.

subtitles.original: Jadi em, ini bonusnya itu cuma untuk kalian
subtitles.english: So, um, this bonus is only for those of you...

subtitles.original: yang beli di hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP ya guys.
subtitles.english: ...who buy at the hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP, guys.

subtitles.original: And there's a second announcement as well!
subtitles.english: And there's a second announcement as well!

subtitles.original: We still have announcements! Oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: We still have announcements! Oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: ね、こちらね、あの... 次の告知、
subtitles.english: So, this is, um... the next announcement,

subtitles.original: なんと！
subtitles.english: Believe it or not!

subtitles.original: オリ曲のMVが出ます！
subtitles.english: A music video for my original song is coming out!

subtitles.english: The original song MV, amazingly, will be...

subtitles.original: 22時でね、あのプレミア公開なので楽しみにしいておいてください！
subtitles.english: ...premiering today at 10 PM, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: MV ori song MV guys! Habis ini jam 8 ya guys!
subtitles.english: MV original song MV, guys! It's at 8 o'clock after this, guys!

subtitles.english: 8 PM Western Indonesia Time, after this!

subtitles.original: The MV of my original song will be released at 10 PM JST after this, after this live!
subtitles.english: The MV of my original song will be released at 10 PM JST after this, after this live!

subtitles.english: from 12 AM your time zone.

subtitles.original: Yippee!

subtitles.original: お楽しみにしいておいてください！
subtitles.english: ...so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そしてですね、
subtitles.english: And then,

subtitles.english: the next one will be the last song.
